title: DamageTintPlus
description: Toggle showing the damage tint on player/horse armor + change color
body:
Adds more customization to the vanilla damage tint.
- /damagetintplus
- [Discord](https://discord.gg/kHSKCMC6rr)
# Features
- Toggle showing the damage tint on player/horse armor
- Change the tint color (ARGB)
